action.reasoning: Observation: CRN PESQ=2.32 vs MetricGAN+ baseline=3.13. CRN severely undertrained (5 epochs). Analysis: Need much more training. Also should improve architecture - bigger model, better loss function. Decision: Train CRN for 30 epochs with improved loss (weighted combination of SI-SNR + multi-res STFT + L1 time domain). Also increase model capacity.
action.command: cd /workspace && python -c "from model import SpeechEnhancementModel, count_parameters; import torch; m = SpeechEnhancementModel(n_fft=512, hop_length=128, channels=[32,64,128,256,512], lstm_hidden=512, lstm_layers=2); print(f'Params: {count_parameters(m):,}'); x = torch.randn(2, 32000); y = m(x); print(f'In: {x.shape}, Out: {y.shape}')"
